title: spiranthes lacera var. eatonii
intro: Spiranthes lacera var. eatonii, also known as Eaton's ladies' tresses, is a type of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Spiranthes lacera var. eatonii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
